source: BSData wh40k-10e catalog (cross-referenced against Wahapedia keyword list, verified 2026-03-10)
notes: BattleScribe stores an 'Eradicator' model entry inside the 'Eradicator Squad' unit entry.
Stats and weapons are on the model entry; keywords, infoLinks, and pts=90 are on the unit entry.
ADEPTUS ASTARTES keyword comes from 'Faction: Adeptus Astartes' category — same known gap as Captain.
Rules (Oath of Moment, Templar Vows) are infoLinks on the *unit* entry, not the model entry.
Total Obliteration is an inline ability profile on the unit entry — not a rule node.
Melta rifle is the default weapon; 'Eradicator with Multi-melta' is a separate sibling model entry.
Multi-melta variant weapons may appear as extra weapons due to options-expansion.
pts=90 is on the Eradicator Squad unit entry; the model entry has no own pts cost.

knownDiscrepancies.note: Cross-faction confirmation of the TYRANIDS keyword gap: same extraction path for Faction: Adeptus Astartes.
Oath of Moment and Templar Vows are infoLinks on the Eradicator Squad unit entry, not the Eradicator model entry. Expected to not surface via current pipeline.
